design_philosophy.core_loop: Collect hidden magical notes across side-scrolling levels themed to Fantasia film segments; jump on enemies or use magical bubbles as projectiles to defeat them
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Navigation and combat in tightly-designed levels with poor collision detection creating friction between player intent and game response
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as Mickey Mouse as the Sorcerer's Apprentice, restoring musical notes to the magical world through platforming skill
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Game prioritizes fidelity to Fantasia film aesthetic (animation, music, theming) over gameplay polish; difficulty is set deliberately high, creating punishing experience misaligned with accessible Disney IP expectations

difficulty.checkpointing: Frustrating restart points that create artificial difficulty spikes unrelated to skill progression
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: No documented difficulty settings; players cannot adjust challenge level

progression.upgrade_system: Magical bubbles collected during levels serve as projectile ammunition for enemy defeat
progression.unlock_mechanism: Four elemental-themed levels based on Fantasia segments: water (Sorcerer's Apprentice, Dance of the Reed Flutes, Nutcracker Arabian), earth (Rite of Spring), air (Trepak, Pastoral Symphony, Dance of the Hours), fire (Night on Bald Mountain, Toccata and Fugue)
replayability_hooks: Hidden magical notes scattered throughout levels require exploration and replay to collect all
Elemental level theming encourages engagement with different musical segments

world_building_techniques: Level themes directly adapted from Fantasia film orchestral segments
Enemy design and visual aesthetics tied to specific musical pieces
Mickey Mouse framing as Sorcerer's Apprentice creates narrative context for note collection objective

danger_signals: Licensing disaster: Roy E. Disney halted distribution due to unauthorized adaptation; ~5,000 copies destroyed
Game shipped unpolished due to holiday rush pressure and mid-year Sonic the Hedgehog competition
environmental_storytelling: Gorgeous backdrops and excellent sprite work contrasts sharply with broken collision detection and choppy gameplay
Visual polish masks fundamental design and control problems, creating false impression of quality

sources_used: wikipedia: Fantasia (video game) - gameplay, development, reception sections
